title: Textural Density — Score-Only Upgrade Rubric Toward 90+
principle: Textural Density is evaluated as a formal score-based symbolic descriptor. Methodological strength depends on explicit construct definitions, reproducible score-derived outputs, internal consistency, canonical test cases, corpus benchmarks, transparent assumptions, and auditable architecture.
optional_empirical_note: External human-rating studies may be useful if the project later claims to predict expert or listener judgments. They are not required for the core score-only systematic research line.

dimensions.label: Score-only scientific scope and construct clarity
subcriteria: No audio waveform or measured spectral claims
No psychoacoustic or hearing-model claims on main line
Written dynamics as symbolic score metadata
Legacy/proxy branches opt-in and labelled out of scope

scoring_guidance.9-10: Research-grade scope with enforced defaults and migration notes

scoring_guidance.5-9: Partial axioms with some property tests
scoring_guidance.10-12: Documented axioms and regression/property tests for most constructs
scoring_guidance.13-15: Full formal definitions, axioms, and systematic construct verification

scoring_guidance.10-12: All constructs separately computed and interpretable
scoring_guidance.13-15: Independent outputs, metadata, and validation hooks per construct

dimensions.label: Benchmark corpus and replication package

scoring_guidance.5-9: Scripts and frozen synthetic outputs passing compare
scoring_guidance.10-12: Representative score excerpts with frozen outputs
scoring_guidance.13-15: Mature corpus, CI-integrated replication, reproducible research tables

constraints: Synthetic fixtures earn scaffold credit only
Human ratings are not required for corpus credit

scoring_guidance.10-12: Most score-only path auditable in core/
scoring_guidance.13-15: Full core-native pipeline with compatibility adapters only

scoring_guidance.9-10: Registry audit complete; empirical profiles only with data

scoring_guidance.4-6: Gaps in regression, axioms, or frozen outputs
scoring_guidance.7-8: Strong suite including score-only and replication tests
scoring_guidance.9-10: Comprehensive gates including construct property tests
Research-grade reporting with explain_score_slice and replication metadata

interpretation_bands.label: Functional score-based tool with important formalization, benchmark, or architecture gaps
Strong systematic score-analysis software with good tests and documentation; remaining gaps in corpus, architecture, or construct formalization
Near-publication-grade score-based research infrastructure; strong formal definitions, tests, reporting, and replication scaffolding
Publication-grade systematic score-analysis method with auditable core pipeline, stable benchmark corpus, frozen outputs, and fully documented constructs
Reference implementation: broad symbolic corpus coverage, independent reproducibility, mature API, strong documentation, and stable long-term research workflow

current_status_guidance: Apply human-assigned dimension scores after inspecting the repository. Do not penalize for absence of expert ratings or listening tests on the systematic score-only line. Synthetic corpus limits benchmark_replication; hybrid pipeline limits core_native_architecture.
